title: AI Automation Engineer Tech Lead (Remote)
company_focus: IT value-added reseller providing automation solutions
description:
Who You Are

You are a hands-on technologist who loves turning real-world
business problems into clean, scalable AI and automation
solutions. You are as comfortable meeting with department
heads and frontline managers to understand their pain points
as you are designing LLM-based agents, building workflows,
and wiring APIs together behind the scenes. You communicate
clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders,
ask thoughtful questions, and translate vague ideas into
concrete requirements, prototypes, and production-ready
solutions. You enjoy collaborating in a team environment
where the CIO sets the strategy, a project manager manages
intake and prioritization, and you own the technical
delivery that brings AI and automation to life across the
business.

About The Role

As the AI & Automation Technical Lead at Myriad360, you will
be the primary technical owner and builder of AI- and
automation-powered solutions across the company, reporting
directly to the CIO of a mid-sized IT value-added reseller.
You will partner closely with leaders and department heads
to identify high-impact opportunities, define requirements,
and deliver solutions that reduce friction, improve quality,
and accelerate operations across functions.

You will work within our Microsoft 365–centric environment
and leverage our existing platforms, including Microsoft
Power Platform, ChatGPT Enterprise (supported by a Zero Data
Retention API agreement with OpenAI), and tools such as
Stack AI and Zapier. You will design and implement AI-
powered workflows, agentic workflows, AI agents, and
retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines, integrate
them with our core systems, and coordinate with trusted
third-party partners to execute against a shared backlog of
AI and automation requests.

Must be based in the United States.  Travel up to 10% may be
required.

Other responsibilities include:

- Partner with business leaders and department heads to map
  current processes, elicit requirements, and identify high-
  value AI and automation opportunities across sales,
  operations, finance, services, and IT
- Design, prototype, and implement AI-powered workflows and
  agentic solutions, including task- and process-specific
  agents, copilots, and multi-step orchestrations
- Build and optimize retrieval-augmented generation (RAG)
  pipelines that securely leverage internal data, including
  data preparation, vectorization, retrieval design, and
  relevance tuning
- Develop and maintain integrations across systems using APIs
  (for example Microsoft Graph API, OpenAI API, and other
  SaaS APIs) and automation platforms (such as Power
  Automate, Zapier, n8n, and Make)
- Implement observability, monitoring, evaluation, and
  guardrails for AI agents and workflows, including logging,
  metrics, and feedback loops that support continuous
  improvement
- Collaborate with third-party delivery partners and vendors
  to divide and conquer the AI/automation backlog, provide
  technical direction, and review solution designs for
  quality, security, and maintainability
- Lead and support user acceptance testing (UAT), gather
  feedback, refine solutions, and support rollout and
  adoption through documentation and light training
- Work closely with the CIO and project manager to provide
  technical input into sizing, sequencing, and
  prioritization of automation and AI work
- Complete ongoing security awareness training and comply with
  company policies to the requirements section
- Identify and escalate security risks to the appropriate
  Executive Leadership Team member and actively contribute
  to remediation efforts
- Other duties as assigned

Desired skills and experience:

- 5+ years of hands-on experience in roles such as solutions
  engineer, automation engineer, AI engineer, or similar,
  ideally within a B2B, IT services, VAR, or MSP environment
- Proven experience designing, building, and deploying AI-
  powered solutions using modern LLMs (such as ChatGPT,
  Claude, Gemini or similar), including prompt design, tool
  or agent definition, and evaluation
- Experience with enterprise AI and agent platforms or
  frameworks such as Stack AI, Azure AI Foundry, Crew AI,
  OpenAI AgentKit, Dify, Dust, Langflow, LlamaIndex, Fetch
  AI or comparable tools
- Strong experience working with APIs and integrations,
  including Microsoft Graph API, OpenAI API, RESTful APIs,
  webhooks, authentication/authorization (for example OAuth
  and API keys), and JSON-based data transformations
- Hands-on experience with automation and orchestration tools
  such as Power Automate, Zapier, n8n, or Make to build end-
  to-end workflows
- Familiarity with vector databases and retrieval frameworks
  (e.g., Weaviate, Pinecone, Qdrant, or Chroma) and how they
  support scalable, performant RAG solutions
- Experience designing for observability, safety, and
  governance of AI systems, including logging, monitoring,
  evaluation, and guardrails for enterprise use
- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with a
  demonstrated ability to facilitate working sessions,
  elicit requirements, translate business needs into
  technical designs, and run effective user acceptance
  testing
- Comfort working in a Microsoft 365–centric environment;
  experience with the broader Microsoft Power Platform
  (Power Apps, Power BI) is a plus
- A pragmatic, impact-focused mindset; you prioritize
  solutions that are secure, maintainable, and deliver
  measurable business outcomes over experimentation for its
  own sake

A Little About Us

Our mission is to challenge and enable our employees to
achieve great things.

We live and breathe our core values:

- We Before Me: We demonstrate empathy through our actions and
  solicit diverse voices and opinions. We put ourselves in
  each other’s shoes, readily admit our mistakes, and
  generously share our time and knowledge.

- Dare To Be Great: We are big-picture thinkers who focus on
  solutions to problems. We solicit and offer actionable
  feedback to others without hesitation. We embrace
  opportunities to improve ourselves, our teams, and our
  work. We aim to be the best of the best.

- Own It: We set clear expectations, communicate proactively,
  and follow through on our commitments. We take pride in
  the experiences we create and the outcomes we deliver. We
  are personally invested in the success of our team and our
  clients. We iterate to deliver ever better results.

We are consistently listed among Inc & Crain's "Best Places
to Work" and we're proud of our accessible & engaged
executive team. We believe in cultivating an atmosphere
of inclusion and providing an environment that enables every
employee to work to the best of their ability.

Some of Our Benefits

- Unlimited Paid Time Off (PTO)
- Incentive compensation plans for all employees
- Company-funded 401k contributions
- Zero-cost employer-covered health insurance
- Annual BYOD (Bring Your Own Device) reimbursement up to $500
- Paid Parental Leave
- Transparent, candid culture with 1:1 coaching, performance
  reviews, and a consistent feedback loop
- Quirky, diverse, respectful, high-performing coworkers
  you’ll want to achieve greatness with!

Pursuant to the NYC Pay Transparency Law, the base salary
range in New York City for this position is $150,000-
$160,000, plus opportunities for bonus and/or commission.
Compensation in other geographies may vary.

Myriad360 is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified
applicants will receive consideration for employment without
regard to sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, race,
color, religion, national origin, disability, protected
veteran status, age, or any other characteristic protected
by law.
responsibilities: Design, prototype, and implement AI-powered workflows and agentic solutions, including task- and process-specific agents, copilots, and multi-step orchestrations
Build and optimize retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) pipelines that securely leverage internal data, including data preparation, vectorization, retrieval design, and relevance tuning
Develop and maintain integrations across systems using APIs such as Microsoft Graph API, OpenAI API, and automation platforms like Power Automate, Zapier, n8n, and Make
Implement observability, monitoring, evaluation, and guardrails for AI agents and workflows, including logging, metrics, and feedback loops that support continuous improvement
Partner with business leaders and department heads to map current processes, elicit requirements, and identify high-value AI and automation opportunities

use_cases: Automate sales processes and workflows to reduce manual tasks and improve efficiency
Streamline operations and finance functions through AI-powered copilots and agents
Enhance IT service delivery with intelligent automation and RAG-powered information retrieval
Improve cross-functional business processes by integrating Microsoft 365 ecosystem with AI agents
Enable secure internal data access and knowledge management through RAG pipelines
Deploy task-specific agents to handle department-specific workflows across the organization
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on design and implementation of LLM-
based agents, AI-powered workflows, and RAG pipelines. The
engineer directly builds and deploys agentic solutions using
ChatGPT Enterprise and various AI frameworks, making it a
hands-on AI development position rather than support
infrastructure.
